description: Deep audit: CEO View group (2 tabs) — tab render + Column A state mutation

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list all open tabs. Close all tabs except one. Clear localStorage for app.phronex.com to avoid stale session state from previous runs.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with email 'qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com' and the QA superadmin password from .qa.env (QA_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD). Wait until the URL no longer contains /auth/login before proceeding.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=accounts. Verify the panel loads — no ErrorBoundary crash, no blank white body, no permanent loading spinner. Take a screenshot.

For each of the following admin tabs in the CEO View group: backup — navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=backup. Verify the tab renders panel content. Record: PASS (content visible), FAIL (error type: 404/500/ErrorBoundary/blank), or EMPTY-STATE.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=accounts. Verify the CEO Scorecard KPI tiles (Total Users, Active Users, CC Instances, Grants, Subscriptions) show numeric values — not '--' or blank. At least one tile must show a number > 0. Then navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=backup and verify the backup status badge is not 'unknown' (it may show 'healthy', 'pending', or a timestamp — any of these is a pass). Record the actual values seen for both tabs.

Take a final screenshot of the last tab visited. Report: (a) tabs that PASSed, (b) tabs that FAILed with error type, (c) tabs in EMPTY-STATE, (d) Column A action result (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY-STATE with observed values), (e) any JavaScript console errors seen.

description: Deep audit: Financial group (9 tabs) — tab render + Column A state mutation

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list all open tabs. Close all tabs except one. Clear localStorage for app.phronex.com to avoid stale session state from previous runs.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with email 'qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com' and the QA superadmin password from .qa.env (QA_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD). Wait until the URL no longer contains /auth/login before proceeding.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=cost-intelligence. Verify the panel loads — no ErrorBoundary crash, no blank white body, no permanent loading spinner. Take a screenshot.

For each of the following admin tabs in the Financial group: revenue-health, monetisation, billing, llm-costs, cost-overview, tier-pricing, infra-cost, credits — navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab={tab_id} for each one. Verify each tab renders panel content. Do not stop at the first failure — visit all tabs. Record: PASS, FAIL (with error type), or EMPTY-STATE for each.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=cost-intelligence. Read any numeric cost figure visible in the main panel (e.g. a monthly total, an infra line item). Note the value. Then navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=infra-cost. Verify infra-cost tab shows cost data (not blank or zero). Cross-reference: if cost-intelligence showed a figure, infra-cost should show the same or a component breakdown. Report the two figures and whether they are consistent.

Take a final screenshot of the last tab visited. Report: (a) tabs that PASSed, (b) tabs that FAILed with error type, (c) tabs in EMPTY-STATE, (d) Column A action result (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY-STATE with observed values), (e) any JavaScript console errors seen.

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list all open tabs. Close all tabs except one. Clear localStorage for app.phronex.com to avoid stale session state from previous runs.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with email 'qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com' and the QA superadmin password from .qa.env (QA_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD). Wait until the URL no longer contains /auth/login before proceeding.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=analytics-bi. Verify the panel loads — no ErrorBoundary crash, no blank white body, no permanent loading spinner. Take a screenshot.

For each of the following admin tabs in the Customer group: b2b-users, b2c-users, user-analytics, analytics, competitive, goal-hierarchy, meeting-intelligence, content-curation, habits-routines, assessment, coach-crm, comc-orgs — navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab={tab_id} for each one. Verify each tab renders panel content. Do not stop at the first failure — visit all tabs. Record: PASS, FAIL (with error type), or EMPTY-STATE for each.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=b2b-users. Click into the first user row visible in the table (if the table is empty, report empty-state and skip the click). If a user detail panel opens, verify it contains at least: email address, role badge, and grants list. Report what fields are populated and whether the panel opened successfully.

Take a final screenshot of the last tab visited. Report: (a) tabs that PASSed, (b) tabs that FAILed with error type, (c) tabs in EMPTY-STATE, (d) Column A action result (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY-STATE with observed values), (e) any JavaScript console errors seen.

description: Deep audit: Internal Process group (14 tabs) — tab render + Column A state mutation

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list all open tabs. Close all tabs except one. Clear localStorage for app.phronex.com to avoid stale session state from previous runs.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with email 'qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com' and the QA superadmin password from .qa.env (QA_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD). Wait until the URL no longer contains /auth/login before proceeding.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=overview. Verify the panel loads — no ErrorBoundary crash, no blank white body, no permanent loading spinner. Take a screenshot.

For each of the following admin tabs in the Internal Process group: host, errors, tools, audit, vendors, registry, ip-protection, scoring-analytics, prompt-safety, llm-routing, ai-decisions, trends, audit-log — navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab={tab_id} for each one. Verify each tab renders panel content. Do not stop at the first failure — visit all tabs. Record: PASS, FAIL (with error type), or EMPTY-STATE for each.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=audit. Use page.evaluate() to fire the audit trigger: const resp = await fetch('/api/admin/auth/api/v1/admin/audit-trigger', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:'{}'}); const body = await resp.json(); Verify the response contains a job_id field (non-empty string). Report the job_id value and HTTP status code. Do NOT wait for the audit to complete — just confirm the trigger endpoint returns a job_id.

Take a final screenshot of the last tab visited. Report: (a) tabs that PASSed, (b) tabs that FAILed with error type, (c) tabs in EMPTY-STATE, (d) Column A action result (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY-STATE with observed values), (e) any JavaScript console errors seen.

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list all open tabs. Close all tabs except one. Clear localStorage for app.phronex.com to avoid stale session state from previous runs.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with email 'qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com' and the QA superadmin password from .qa.env (QA_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD). Wait until the URL no longer contains /auth/login before proceeding.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=new-product. Verify the panel loads — no ErrorBoundary crash, no blank white body, no permanent loading spinner. Take a screenshot.

Do not stop at the first failure — visit all tabs. Record: PASS, FAIL (with error type), or EMPTY-STATE for each.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=new-product. Find the product name input field. Type 'qa-test-launchpad-probe' into it. Verify the slug field auto-populates from the name (it should become 'qa-test-launchpad-probe' or a slugified version). Do NOT submit the form. Clear the name field after verifying. Report whether slug auto-population worked.

Take a final screenshot of the last tab visited. Report: (a) tabs that PASSed, (b) tabs that FAILed with error type, (c) tabs in EMPTY-STATE, (d) Column A action result (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY-STATE with observed values), (e) any JavaScript console errors seen.

description: Deep audit: Admin Plumbing group (8 tabs) — tab render + Column A state mutation

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list all open tabs. Close all tabs except one. Clear localStorage for app.phronex.com to avoid stale session state from previous runs.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with email 'qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com' and the QA superadmin password from .qa.env (QA_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD). Wait until the URL no longer contains /auth/login before proceeding.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=auth-config. Verify the panel loads — no ErrorBoundary crash, no blank white body, no permanent loading spinner. Take a screenshot.

For each of the following admin tabs in the Admin Plumbing group: email, mailboxes, notif-channels, identity-rbac, rbac-roles, rbac-orgs, rbac-accounts — navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab={tab_id} for each one. Verify each tab renders panel content. Do not stop at the first failure — visit all tabs. Record: PASS, FAIL (with error type), or EMPTY-STATE for each.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=rbac-orgs. Click the 'Create Organisation' button (or 'Create' if labelled differently). Verify the inline form opens with at least a Name field and a Slug field. Type 'qa-probe-org' into the Name field. Verify Slug auto-populates. Click Cancel (do NOT submit — this is a probe, not a real org creation). Verify the form closes after Cancel. Report: form opened (yes/no), slug auto-populated (yes/no), form closed after Cancel (yes/no).

Take a final screenshot of the last tab visited. Report: (a) tabs that PASSed, (b) tabs that FAILed with error type, (c) tabs in EMPTY-STATE, (d) Column A action result (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY-STATE with observed values), (e) any JavaScript console errors seen.

description: RBAC gate: owner role must be redirected away from /admin (server-side requireSuperadmin guard)

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Close all extra tabs, clear cookies and localStorage for app.phronex.com.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with the QA owner account credentials from .qa.env (QA_OWNER_EMAIL / QA_OWNER_PASSWORD). Wait for redirect away from /auth/login.
Navigate directly to https://app.phronex.com/admin. Note the resulting URL after any redirects settle.

Confirm the page did NOT render admin panel content — no tab group pills ('CEO VIEW', 'FINANCIAL', etc.) should be visible, no admin heading. Confirm the URL redirected away from /admin (expected destination: /products or /dashboard).
Also navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=auth-config — this must also redirect, not render admin content.
Screenshot the final URL. Report PASS if all /admin paths redirected without rendering admin content, FAIL if any admin content was visible.

description: RBAC gate: regular user role must be redirected away from /admin (server-side requireSuperadmin guard)

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Close all extra tabs, clear cookies and localStorage for app.phronex.com.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in with the QA user account credentials from .qa.env (QA_USER_EMAIL / QA_USER_PASSWORD). Wait for redirect away from /auth/login.
Navigate directly to https://app.phronex.com/admin. Note the resulting URL after any redirects settle.

Confirm the page did NOT render admin panel content — no tab group pills ('CEO VIEW', 'FINANCIAL', etc.) should be visible, no admin heading. Confirm the URL redirected away from /admin (expected destination: /products or /dashboard).
Also navigate to https://app.phronex.com/admin?tab=auth-config — this must also redirect, not render admin content.
Screenshot the final URL. Report PASS if all /admin paths redirected without rendering admin content, FAIL if any admin content was visible.
